final:
module top_module(
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output reg power_out
);always @(*) begin
  wire _tap_VPWR = VPWR & {1{1'b1}};

    if (VPWR || VGND || VPB || VNB) begin
        power_out = 1'b1;
    end else begin
        power_out = 1'b0;
    end
end

endmodule
